user.title: TTN JSON — Device
user.description:
Enter your TTN device ID and uplink MQTT topic.

Sensor entities will be created automatically when the first uplink message is received. Use `<EUI>` as a placeholder for the device ID in the topic.

selects.title: TTN JSON — Mode Select Entities (optional)
selects.description:
Add select entities for **{eui}** to send uint8 mode commands as TTN downlinks.

One block per select, separated by a blank line:

  name=mode
  f_port=1
  state_path=uplink_message/decoded_payload/mode
  AUTO:0
  STOW:1

Leave blank to skip.

error.mqtt_unavailable: MQTT integration is not available. Please configure MQTT first.
error.duplicate_eui: A device with this EUI is already configured.
error.bad_selects: Could not parse select definitions. Check the format shown above.

abort.already_configured: This device EUI is already configured.
